title: McpStatusOutput
description: JSON output of `chemag mcp status --format json`. Stable public contract — once shipped, any change requires a changeset and release notes.

client.description: The MCP client this status row describes.

scope.description: Whether the registration was inspected at user or project scope.

config_path.description: Absolute path to the MCP config file consulted (file may not exist yet — see notes).

registered.description: True iff a chemag entry was found in the config.

server_command.description: The chemag invocation as registered (e.g. "chemag mcp --workspace /abs/path"), or null when not registered.

notes.description: Human-readable notes (e.g. "claude CLI not on PATH; using JSON file fallback", "config file does not exist yet").
